imageAlt: Mettle - Bank account closures roadmap item preview image
title: Mettle - Bank account closures
summaryBody: When businesses leave mettle, they should no longer receive a funded (free) FreeAgent account. Instead we should be switching their subscription from funded to direct.
detailBody: When businesses leave mettle, they should no longer receive a funded (free) FreeAgent account. Instead we should be switching their subscription from funded to direct.
